ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Batting and throwing handedness (e.g., 'Right/Right', 'Left/Left') */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the metrics */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the metrics correspond to */,
  "pitches" INTEGER /* Number of pitches faced */,
  "batted_balls" INTEGER /* Number of batted balls */,
  "barrels" INTEGER /* Number of barrels hit */,
  "barrel_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of batted balls that were barrels */,
  "exit_velocity" REAL /* Average exit velocity of batted balls */,
  "max_ev" REAL /* Maximum exit velocity recorded */,
  "launch_angle" REAL /* Average launch angle of batted balls */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "ground_balls" INTEGER /* Number of ground balls */,
  "fly_balls" INTEGER /* Number of fly balls */,
  "line_drives" INTEGER /* Number of line drives */,
  "pop_flys" REAL /* Number of pop flies */,
  "in_play_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of at-bats that resulted in a batted ball in play */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "on_base_plus_slugging" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_statistics" (
  "bat_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated performance metric entry */,
  "xba" REAL /* Expected batting average */,
  "xslg" REAL /* Expected slugging percentage */,
  "woba" REAL /* Weighted on-base average */,
  "xwoba" REAL /* Expected weighted on-base average */,
  "xwobacon" REAL /* Expected weighted on-base average based on contact */,
  "hard_hit_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of hard-hit balls */,
  "k_percentage" REAL /* Strikeout percentage */,
  "bb_percentage" REAL /* Walk percentage */,
  "iso" REAL /* Isolated power */,
  "iso90" REAL /* Isolated power adjusted to a 90-foot base distance */,
  "iso50" REAL /* Isolated power adjusted to a 50-foot base distance */,
  "pull_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of batted balls hit to the pull side */,
  "opposite_field_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of batted balls hit to the opposite field */,
  "center_field_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of batted balls hit to center field */,
  "gb_percentage" REAL /* Ground ball percentage */,
  "fb_percentage" REAL /* Fly ball percentage */,
  "ld_percentage" REAL /* Line drive percentage */,
  "iffb_percentage" REAL /* Infield fly ball percentage */,
  "babip" REAL /* Batting average on balls in play */,
  "wrc" INTEGER /* Weighted runs created */,
  "wrc_plus" INTEGER /* Weighted runs created plus */,
  "baserunning" REAL /* Baserunning value */,
  "defensive_runs_saved" INTEGER /* Defensive runs saved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bat_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_statistics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_statistics" (
  "pitch_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitching statistic record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated performance metric entry */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "xera" REAL /* Expected earned run average */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Total innings pitched */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks issued */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "hits_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of hits allowed */,
  "home_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of home runs allowed */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs allowed */,
  "unearned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of unearned runs allowed */,
  "batters_faced" INTEGER /* Number of batters faced */,
  "ground_balls" INTEGER /* Number of ground balls allowed */,
  "fly_balls" INTEGER /* Number of fly balls allowed */,
  "line_drives" INTEGER /* Number of line drives allowed */,
  "pop_flys" INTEGER /* Number of pop flies allowed */,
  "strikeout_walk_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of strikeouts to walks */,
  "ground_ball_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ground balls allowed */,
  "fly_ball_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of fly balls allowed */,
  "line_drive_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of line drives allowed */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  "fip" REAL /* Fielding independent pitching */,
  "xfip" REAL /* Expected fielding independent pitching */,
  "ERA_minus" INTEGER /* ERA minus */,
  "ERA_plus" INTEGER /* ERA plus */,
  "quality_starts" INTEGER /* Number of quality starts */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "holds" INTEGER /* Number of holds */,
  "blown_saves" INTEGER /* Number of blown saves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_statistics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home base */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., 'NL', 'AL') */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., 'NL East', 'AL West') */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary team colors */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season" INTEGER /* Indicates if the season is a regular season (vs. spring training, etc.) */,
  "playoff_teams" TEXT /* Teams that made the playoffs */,
  "world_series_winner" TEXT /* World Series winner for the season */,
  "all_star_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the All-Star Game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_team" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's tenure with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's tenure with the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Player's role (e.g., 'Starter', 'Reliever', 'Bench') */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status (e.g., 'Active', 'Injured', 'Retired') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
